title: Penguin Mod flash
description: Snowy penguin and a super sword
body:
## 🐧 Penguin Mod Flash
Penguin Mod Flash brings a touch of life and magic to the frozen corners of Minecraft. This mod introduces interactive penguins to all snowy biomes, offering players new companions and the materials needed to forge a powerful, frost-enchanted weapon.

![Image of a snowy penguin from inside the game Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7e768c80a90677f08f1bbd07b585583901e2535_0.webp)

This is an image of "the Penguin"—the creature for which we designed this modification—a small bird, white in front and black behind, appearing against a backdrop centered around an image of the moon.

## Key Features
Lively Snowy Biomes: Penguins now inhabit all snowy biomes, making the frozen world feel more active and immersive.

Unique AI & Behavior: * Penguins are peaceful creatures but show their wild side when hunting fish.

They are attracted to players holding fish and will follow you eagerly.

Once tamed, they become loyal companions that follow you on your adventures.

The Penguin Sword: A magical weapon crafted and repaired using Penguin Hide (dropped by penguins, 1-4 pieces each).

## 🐾 Taming & Interaction
Taming Food: You can tame a penguin using any type of fish (Raw Salmon, Cod, Tropical Fish, etc.), except for the Pufferfish due to its toxicity.

Following Mechanics: Penguins will follow any player holding fish in their hand. Once tamed, they remain by your side.

Spawning: Look for them in any biome covered in snow or ice.

## ⚔️ The Penguin Sword (Ice Sword)
This sword is more than just a blade; it harnesses the power of the arctic:

Slowness Effect: Each hit applies a Slowness effect to your target for 3 to 4 seconds, making it perfect for crowd control.

Snow Particles: Visual snow particles fall with every strike, adding a cinematic feel to combat.

Speed Boost: While holding the sword, the player receives a Speed Boost. This effect lingers for 2 to 3 seconds even after switching to another item.

Maintenance: The sword is fully compatible with all enchantments and can be repaired at an anvil using Penguin Hide.

This is the "Penguin Sword," crafted from penguin hide. It possesses supernatural properties: enhanced running speed, a "Frost" strike that slows down enemies, and a snowfall effect that activates with every hit.

![This sword is more than just a blade; it harnesses the power of the arctic:  Slowness Effect: Each hit applies a Slowness effect to your target for 3 to 4 seconds, making it perfect for crowd control.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d55cf8e543d071e5a033a1846eb2ec562da8cf7b.png)

## 🛠️ Technical Specifications
Supported Versions: 1.17.1, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.1, 1.20.4, 1.20.6, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8.

Platforms: Supports Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge.

Environment: Client-side.

## 📜 Credits & Permissions
Developer: FLASH_ZIO.

Modpacks: You are welcome to include this mod in your modpacks! Please provide credit and a link to this page.

## How is it made?
Place a single stick in the center of the last square, and place two pieces of penguin hide on top of it. Thus, you have crafted your sword.

![How is it made sword؟ Place a single stick in the center of the last square, and place two pieces of penguin hide on top of it. Thus, you have crafted your sword.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f6afeb4a7745f069aa7b25b5d42031eeffb1791.jpeg)
